title: High Protein Cottage Cheese Dip
metaDescription: Whipped cottage cheese dip with 14g of protein per serving — blended smooth with everything bagel seasoning. Ready in 5 minutes, no cooking required.
targetKeywords: high protein snacks on the go
author: Recipe Team
keywords: cottage cheese dip, whipped cottage cheese, everything bagel dip
ingredients: 1 tsp everything bagel seasoning, plus more for topping
Sliced cucumber and bell pepper, for serving

steps.name: Blend until smooth
steps.text: Add cottage cheese, olive oil, lemon juice, everything bagel seasoning, and salt to a blender or food processor. Blend for 1-2 minutes until completely smooth and airy, scraping down the sides as needed.

steps.name: Transfer to a bowl
steps.text: Spoon the whipped mixture into a serving bowl, swirling the top with the back of a spoon.

steps.name: Top and serve
steps.text: Sprinkle with extra everything bagel seasoning and chopped chives. Serve with sliced cucumber and bell pepper for dipping.

tips.question: Why blend the cottage cheese instead of just stirring it?
tips.answer: Blending is what makes this a dip instead of a bowl of cottage cheese with toppings — a full 1-2 minutes in a blender or food processor gives it a whipped, airy texture closer to cream cheese than to curds.

tips.question: How long does this dip keep in the fridge?
tips.answer: Up to 4 days in an airtight container. The texture stays smooth; just give it a quick stir before serving.

tips.question: What else can I dip in this besides vegetables?
tips.answer: Whole grain crackers, pita chips, or even as a spread on toast all work well.

tips.question: Can I make this dip savory in a different way?
tips.answer: Yes — swap the everything bagel seasoning for garlic powder and fresh herbs, or a spoonful of pesto, for a different flavor direction.

images.heroAlt: Bowl of whipped cottage cheese dip topped with everything bagel seasoning and chives, surrounded by cucumber and bell pepper slices
images.textureAlt: Spoon lifting whipped cottage cheese dip showing its smooth, airy texture
images.pinAlt: Cucumber slice being dipped into whipped cottage cheese dip topped with everything bagel seasoning

storyIntro: Whipped cottage cheese is one of those ideas that sounds strange until you taste it — a full blend turns it into something closer to a lighter, tangier cream cheese than anything resembling curds.

This version leans savory, with everything bagel seasoning and a squeeze of lemon, and comes together in five minutes with zero cooking. 14g of protein per serving, and it disappears fast next to a plate of cut vegetables.
storyNote: Give the blender or food processor the full one to two minutes it needs. Stopping early is the difference between a dip and a slightly-smoother bowl of cottage cheese.
